view.title: Rohe {hostname}
view.name: Ingoa:
view.noDomainLogFound: Kāore he tuhinga rohe i kitea.
view.allGoodNoErrors: Katoa pai! Kāore he hapa i mōhiohio whakapā!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tono anō i te īmēra whakamihi?
view.welcomeEmailResent: Kua tukuna anō te īmēra whakamihi. Tirohia tō pouaka tomo.

order.findDomain: Kimihia tō rohe ā tiakina te waatea.
order.premiumAvailable: Āe! Kei waatea tō rohe {domain} ā he rohe premium. Kua ārai te rēhitatanga aunoa. Īmēratia {email} mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te hoko i tēnei rohe mō te {cost} ia tau.
order.premiumTaken: Aroha mai! Kua tangohia kē tō rohe {domain}! Nōu kē? Ka taea e koe te whakawhiti, ā he rohe premium. Kua ārai te rēhitatanga aunoa. Īmēratia {email} mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te hoko i tēnei rohe mō te {cost} ia tau.
order.available: Āe! Kei waatea tō rohe {domain}! Ka taea e koe te rēhita mō te {cost}. Ko te utu whakahōu ka noho ko {renewal}.
order.taken: Aroha mai! Kua tangohia kē tō rohe {domain}! Nōu kē? Ka taea e koe te whakawhiti mō te {cost}. Ko te utu whakahōu ka noho ko {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Ka aunoa te whakahōu o te ohaurunga i muri i ia tau mō te {cost} tae noa ki te whakakore.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Mā te tīnei i tēnei pouaka, ka whakaaetia e koe ko koe e hoko ana i tētahi hua ohaurunga e aunoa ana te whakahōu (E ai ki ngā Tikanga i Whakaahuatia i Runga) ā ka utua ki te kāri nama e tukua ana e koe i tēnei rā. Ki te hiahia koe ki te whakakore i tō whakahōu aunoa, ka taea e koe te uru ki te kaitiaki kiritaki (Konei) kōwhiri ana i te ratonga hohe ā pāwhiri ana i te hononga Whakakore i te īmēra rānei ki: billing{'@'}interserver.net i tētahi tikanga atu rānei i whakaahuatia i ngā Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga. Mā te tīnei i te pouaka ā pāwhiri ana i te Whakatū Tōku Ota i raro, ka whakaaetia hoki e koe kua pānuitia, mārama, ā whakaae ana ki ā mātou Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga me te Kaupapahere Tūmataitanga.
order.agreeCheckbox: Kua pānuitia e ahau ngā tikanga i runga ā whakaae ana ahau.
order.searchingDomain: Tāria! E rapua ana tēnei ingoa rohe.
order.loadingDomainFields: Tāria! E uta ana ngā kāwai rohe.

nameservers.title: Ngā Tūmau Ingoa Rohe
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Kua hoatia ngā tūmau ingoa tūtohu. Pāwhiria Whakahōu ki te tiaki.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: E tū ana koe ki te muku i tō tūmau ingoa rohe.

eppCode.title: Īmēra Waehere EPP
eppCode.confirmMessage: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tuku i te Waehere EPP ki te īmēra kua rēhitatia?

whois.title: Tūmataitanga Whois
whois.renewalNote: Ka whakahōu te Tūmataitanga Whois i ia 12 marama mai i te rā whakamana. Ko te utu whakahōu āpitihanga Tūmataitanga Whois ko {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Kāore te Tūmataitanga Whois i waatea mō tēnei TLD.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Kei whakamana ana te Tūmataitanga Whois mō {hostname}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Ka huna e te Tūmataitanga Whakapā te tuakiri o tētahi Kaiwhakamahi ina rapua e tētahi kaiwhakamahi te rohe o taua Kaiwhakamahi mā WHOIS.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Ko te painga o te Tūmataitanga Whakapā ko te ārai i te tuakiri o te Kaiwhakamahi, tae atu ki te wāhitau kāinga, tau waea, me te wāhitau īmēra, mai i ngā kaiwhakatohetohe, kaipahua tuakiri me ngā kaikeke.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Ina whakamana ngā Kaiwhakamahi i te ratonga Tūmataitanga Whakapā, ka puta ake ngā mōhiohio whakapā hipokina i te pātengi raraunga WHOIS tūmatanui.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Kei waatea te tūmataitanga whakapā mō te {cost} ia rohe ia tau.
whois.enableNow: Ki te whakamana i te Tūmataitanga Whakapā mō tō Rohe, Whakatū Ota Ināianei.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Utu Tūmataitanga Whois: {cost} ia tau. He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te whakatū i tēnei ota?
whois.placingOrder: E whakatū ana i te ota...
whois.orderSuccess: Kua whakatūria pai te ota tūmataitanga whois!
whois.enableMessage: He āpitihanga tūmataitanga whois utua tō rohe {hostname} kāore anō kia whakamana. Ka hiahia ana koe ki te whakamana ināianei?
whois.enablingWhois: E whakamana ana i te tūmataitanga whois...
whois.disableMessage: Kei whakamana ana tō rohe {hostname} āpitihanga Tūmataitanga Whois. He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te whakakore ā whakakore?
whois.disablingWhois: E whakakore ana i te tūmataitanga whois...
whois.whoisDisabled: Kua whakakore ā whakakoretia te Tūmataitanga Whois.

whoisToggle.title: Āpitihanga Tūmataitanga Whois
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Ko tō rohe {domain} Āpitihanga Tūmataitanga Whois kei Whakamana
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Ko tō rohe {domain} Āpitihanga Tūmataitanga Whois kei Whakakore
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te Whakamana Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te Whakakore ā Whakakoretia?

lock.inactivateLock: Ka hiahia ana koe ki te Whakakore i te rāhui rohe?

dnssec.noRecords: Kāore he Rekoata DNSSEC i kitea.
dnssec.enterDigest: Tāuruhia Uara o Digest (Me kaua e nui ake i {max} Pūāhua)
dnssec.unableToParse: Kāore i āhei ki te tātari i te hōputanga rekoata DS.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Ka tangohia ēnei ngā rekoata DNSSEC katoa mō tēnei rohe.
dnssec.removingRecords: E tango ana i ngā rekoata DNSSEC...
dnssec.removeSuccess: Kua tangohia pai ngā rekoata DNSSEC!
dnssec.savingRecords: E tiaki ana i ngā rekoata DNSSEC...
dnssec.saveSuccess: Kua tiakina pai ngā rekoata DNSSEC!
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Whakakīia ōrite ki tētahi rekoata DNSSEC kotahi.

renew.title: Whakahōu
renew.tip1: Me whakahōu te rohe i te rā mutunga, i mua rānei.
renew.tip2: Ki te pau te rohe ka taea pea tētahi wā whakaaroha mai i te rā mutunga ki te whakahōu.
renew.tip3: Whakamana Tūmataitanga Whois ki te huna i tō Mōhiohio Whakapā ina rapua e tētahi kaiwhakamahi te rohe o taua Kaiwhakamahi mā WHOIS.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Ki te whakahōu i tō rohe, utua tūāhuatia te pire kei reira.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Katoa utu: {cost}. He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te whakatū i tēnei ota whakahōu?
renew.placingRenewalOrder: E whakatū ana i te ota whakahōu...
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Kua whakatūria pai te ota whakahōu rohe!
renew.loadingRenewalInfo: E uta ana i ngā mōhiohio whakahōu...
